source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Which of the figures shown bellow cannot be cut out of the figure illustrated nearby?
<image_1>
extraction_notes: options field only contains option labels without option text
image_1 contains a PIL image object description rather than a path or URL

issues: metadata.extraction_notes state that image_1 contains a PIL image object description rather than a path or URL
metadata.extraction_notes state that options only contain option labels without option text
metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains one image path

image_dependency: 题干直接引用“figures shown below”和“figure illustrated nearby”，核心信息在图片中
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，文本本身不足以解题
选项只有 A-E 标签，没有文字内容，必须依赖图像中的候选图形
multi_step: 需要将多个候选图形与目标图形进行逐一匹配/排除，不是单步事实读取
题目涉及“cannot be cut out”这类空间拼合或形状可构成性判断，通常包含视觉比较与约束组合
choice_count=5，解题过程大概率包含多候选筛查
verifiability: answer_type 为 option，标准答案是单个选项“E”，结果形式清晰
asset_registry_record.answer_present=true 且 registry_passed=true，基础资产登记通过
但存在提取问题：选项无文本、image_1 描述异常，后续规则核验可做但会受资产表示质量影响

risk_flags: metadata.extraction_notes state that image_1 contains a PIL image object description rather than a path or URL
metadata.extraction_notes state that options only contain option labels without option text
metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains one image path

decision_reasons: Question, primary image, and answer are present, so the core problem semantics are still recoverable.
The sample is highly image-dependent, and the image asset exists, which prevents a reject decision.
Asset representation issues remain: image metadata is inconsistent and the options only preserve labels without option text.
Because there are recoverable assets but nontrivial extraction gaps, this fits low_priority rather than keep.

agent_assessment.rationale: The task is clear: choose which labeled shape A-E cannot be obtained from the nearby source figure. Although the structured fields only list option labels and the text references a single image placeholder, the provided image clearly shows the source shape and all five labeled answer figures, so a human annotator can understand the question and expected option answer.
